content.en:
Ye Tian took out a lot of precious materials and used them in the construction of this dojo, after all, it was a very important place for his cultivation in the future, so he naturally had to invest more resources.

In addition, Ye Tian also arranged a number of magic circles, these magic circles all involved a variety of extreme extreme paths, even ordinary extreme realm perfect controllers were difficult to break these magic circles.

It took a long time for Ye Tiancai to completely build this magic circle.

"From now on, I will send a replica body to retreat here for a long time!"

Ye Tian decided.

And on the other side of the Origin Realm Sea, just send a will clone to sit in charge.

In the following years, Ye Tian made every effort to comprehend the extreme path of the extreme sword, and strived to raise the extreme path of the knife to the extreme realm.

Other than that.

With the help of the identity of the Golden-winged Peng Bird, Ye Tian came into contact with countless Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, among which there were many demons with Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, so the number of his own Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments was increasing.

Gradually, many of Ye Tian's extreme paths were cultivated to the consummation realm by Ye Tian's enlightenment.

Relying on these Perfection Realm Extreme Dao and those Extreme Extreme Dao, Ye Tian still had difficulty cultivating the Endless Extreme Dao to the Perfection Realm.

"Let's cultivate slowly, and when more and more Extreme Dao ascends to the Consummation Realm, the Endless Extreme Dao will be able to feed back to the Consummation Realm!" Ye Tian said darkly.

But it will take an incomparably long time, and it will not be a goal that can be achieved overnight.

......

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao of Sword was cultivated to the limit by him.

As for whether he can stay in the Primordial Black Sea forever now, he doesn't know, there is no way to test it anyway.

As the Extreme Dao of the Sword was raised to the extreme realm, Ye Tian had no way to comprehend other Extreme Extreme Dao, so he began to look for treasures containing other Extreme Extreme Dao.

In the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers have this kind of treasure, but if the other party doesn't take it out, Ye Tian can't copy it!

He couldn't say that he should let these extreme creatures take out this treasure and give him a look, it was absolutely impossible.

So, he can only choose to trade.

It's a pity that these strong people don't see the treasures they need, and they won't take out this kind of treasure.

"The only treasure I have to attract now is the Cause and Effect Purple Flower, and the other treasures that have been acquired are rarely needed by the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller. But the Purple Flower of Cause and Effect is definitely wanted by many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But the causal purple flower can't be traded in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, otherwise he won't be able to explain the origin of this treasure, after all, he was the causal purple flower he snatched from the Extreme Dao Demon Domain!

"It seems that we still have to trade the causal purple flower at the end of the realm!"

Ye Tian decided.

This time, Ye Tian was going to designate a treasure transaction, that is, to use the causal purple flower to trade the treasure containing the extreme time pole, as for whether it could be traded, it would depend on luck.

So, Ye Tian asked the Lord of Canggu for help and posted this task on the Extreme Dao Network.

After the Lord of Canggu knew that Ye Tian had the Cause and Effect Purple Flower in his hand, he was really shocked and wanted to, so he had not yet comprehended the Cause and Effect Extreme Dao, and the Cause and Effect Extreme Dao was too useful.

The Lord of the Ancient wanted to exchange the countless treasures on his body for the Purple Flower of Cause and Effect, but in the end, he still didn't say such a thing.

Soon, the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Entire Realm knew the news of the Cause and Effect Purple Flower, and they were all very excited!

Everyone knows that the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect is difficult to cultivate, it is much more difficult to cultivate than other Extreme Paths, and there is no way for other Extreme Paths to cultivate to perfection to enhance their strength.

But the Cause and Effect Extreme Path is different, even if it is an entry-level Cause and Effect Extreme Path, it is of great help, and many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers want to improve the realm of the Cause and Effect Extreme Path, and the Cause and Effect Purple Flower can do it.

......

Extreme True River.

"Canggu, that kid has a causal purple flower on his hand?"

The Lord of the White Night was a little surprised.

Moreover, it would be too stupid for the Lord of the Ancient to use the Causal Purple Flower to trade treasures containing the Extreme Time Extreme.

After all, the treasure that contains the Extreme Time Pole, even if it is traded, there is no way to master the Extreme Time Pole with just one piece, and if you can't master it, then there is no way to improve your strength.

But the causal purple flower is different, it can improve the realm of the extreme path of cause and effect!

After all, whether it is the end of the realm or the deep sea of the Extreme Path, there are many Extreme Path treasures that contain the Extreme Path of Time, so there are reference objects as references, and there are even Extreme Dao Tablets containing the Extreme Path of Time, so many Extreme Realm perfect controllers have mastered the Extreme Path of Time in the Perfection Realm.

But there is almost no way to comprehend the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect, and there are few perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm who have cultivated the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect to the realm of perfection.

Therefore, the value of the causal purple flower far exceeds that of other treasures.

"My causal pole is only a small realm, the causal purple flower is of great use to me, and I also happen to have a time snake bead containing the extreme time pole in my hand, although it is from a special creature, but the time snake bead does contain the extreme time pole!"

Subsequently, the Lord of the White Night contacted the Lord of the Ancients.

Soon.

The Lord of the Ancient Dynasty contacted Ye Tian.

"Lord of Endless, Lord of the White Night has the treasure you need to contain the ultimate time path!" said the Lord of the Ancients.

"Really?"

Ye Tian was so excited!

"Thank you, Lord of the Ancients!" Ye Tian said gratefully.

"It's a trivial matter, I'm going to contact the Lord of the White Night and make a deal!"

The Lord of the Ancients.

Not long after, Ye Tian and the Lord of the Ancient Ages met the Lord of the White Night.

When the Lord of the White Night saw Ye Tian, he immediately understood that the person he wanted to trade was not the Lord of Canggu, but Ye Tian.

"This is the Time Snake Bead, not from the Extreme Deep Sea and the End of the Realm, nor is it a treasure conceived by heaven and earth, it is a creature I accidentally encountered in the Primordial Black Sea, and after killing it, a bead found in its body should be similar to the energy core of some creatures. This Time Snake Bead contains the Extreme Time Extreme, and it contains a lot of it, I don't know if it can be used to trade your Cause and Effect Purple Flower!" asked the Lord of the White Night.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed, but held back the excitement in his heart and behaved relatively calmly.

"Very good, let's start trading!"

The Lord of the White Night.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took out the causal purple flower, and after the Lord of the White Night confirmed that it was correct, he completed the transaction with Ye Tian.

Swish!

The Lord of the White Night took the Cause and Effect Purple Flower and left directly.

And Ye Tian took the time snake bead and went back to retreat and practice.
